mnemonics: Metrics Matter, Measure Often, Targets Are Key
keyPoints: UX Goals: Define what you want users to achieve
UX Measures: Identify what you want to measure (e.g. time on task, conversion rate)
Measurement Instruments: Tools used to collect data (e.g. heatmaps, user interviews)
UX Metrics: Quantifiable outcomes that indicate success (e.g. click-through rate, user satisfaction)
